title: asclepias scandens
intro: Asclepias scandens, also known as Woodland Milkweed, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the milkweed family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Asclepias scandens include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Asclepias scandens can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote healing and alleviate various health concerns.
